name: clean-my-disk
description: A safe, free, self-hosted disk-cleanup skill for Claude Code — reclaim disk space without paying for CleanMyMac, DaisyDisk, or BleachBit.

plugins.name: disk-cleanup
plugins.description: Scans read-only, reports reclaimable space by tier, and safely deletes only allowlisted regenerable caches, temp files, and trash on macOS, Linux, and Windows.
